title: Understanding Ratios
text: A ratio is a comparison between two quantities. It tells us how much of one thing there is compared to another.

title: Understanding Rates
text: A rate is a specific kind of ratio in which two quantities with different units are compared, such as miles per hour or cost per item.

title: Understanding Proportions
text: A proportion is an equation that states that two ratios are equivalent. For example, if $$\frac{1}{2}$$ $$=$$ $$\frac{2}{4}$$, then these two ratios form a proportion.

title: Finding the GCD
text: To simplify a fraction, find the greatest common divisor (GCD) of the numerator and the denominator. What is the GCD of $$9$$ and 12?

title: Simplifying the Fraction
text: Divide both the numerator and the denominator by their GCD to simplify the fraction. What is $$9$$ divided by $$3$$ and $$12$$ divided by 3?
